migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_print_job (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, job_no VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL UNIQUE, work_order_path VARCHAR(256), document_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, pages INTEGER NOT NULL, pages_printed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, line_code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL); INSERT INTO mes_print_job (id, job_no, document_name, pages, status, line_code) SELECT '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'PRINT-2026-001', 'Product label batch A', 10, 'pending', 'PRINT-LINE-01' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_print_job WHERE job_no = 'PRINT-2026-001');

blueprints.name: printer-v1
blueprints.description: Industrial printer — status and job telemetry

objects.name: printer-01
objects.description: MES print line — virtual printer for demo process

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"jobs","sql":"SELECT job_no, document_name, pages, pages_printed, status, COALESCE(work_order_path, '') AS work_order_path FROM mes_print_job ORDER BY job_no"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${jobs}","fields":{"jobNo":"${item.job_no}","documentName":"${item.document_name}","pages":"${item.pages}","pagesPrinted":"${item.pages_printed}","status":"${item.status}","workOrderPath":"${item.work_order_path}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"job","sql":"SELECT job_no, status, pages FROM mes_print_job WHERE job_no = ?","params":["${input.jobNo}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"job","message":"Print job not found"},{"type":"failIfNotEquals","var":"job.status","equals":"pending","message":"Job is not pending"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_print_job SET status = 'printing', pages_printed = 0 WHERE job_no = ?","params":["${input.jobNo}"]},{"type":"writeVariable","objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variable":"status","fields":{"value":"printing"}},{"type":"writeVariable","objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variable":"currentJobId","fields":{"value":"${input.jobNo}"}},{"type":"writeVariable","objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variable":"pagesPrinted","fields":{"value":0}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","status":"printing","pages":0}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"job","sql":"SELECT job_no, status, pages FROM mes_print_job WHERE job_no = ?","params":["${input.jobNo}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"job","message":"Print job not found"},{"type":"failIfNotEquals","var":"job.status","equals":"printing","message":"Job is not printing"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_print_job SET status = 'completed', pages_printed = pages WHERE job_no = ?","params":["${input.jobNo}"]},{"type":"writeVariable","objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variable":"status","fields":{"value":"idle"}},{"type":"writeVariable","objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variable":"currentJobId","fields":{"value":""}},{"type":"writeVariable","objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variable":"pagesPrinted","fields":{"value":"${job.pages}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","status":"completed","pagesPrinted":"${job.pages}"}}]}

reports.title: Print job queue
reports.description: Pending and active print jobs for the line
reports.query: SELECT job_no, document_name, pages, pages_printed, status, COALESCE(work_order_path, '') AS work_order_path FROM mes_print_job ORDER BY job_no

dashboards.title: Print Line HMI
dashboards.layoutJson:
{"columns":12,"rowHeight":72,"widgets":[{"id":"process-help","type":"html-snippet","title":"Процесс печати","x":0,"y":0,"w":12,"h":2,"htmlJson":"

Шаги оператора: 1) В таблице задание pending — нажмите Begin. 2) Статус принтера printing, текущее задание заполнено. 3) После печати — Complete. 4) Принтер снова idle, задание completed.

"},{"id":"printer-status","type":"value","title":"Printer status","x":0,"y":2,"w":3,"h":2,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variableName":"status","valueField":"value"},{"id":"current-job","type":"value","title":"Current job","x":3,"y":2,"w":3,"h":2,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variableName":"currentJobId","valueField":"value"},{"id":"pages","type":"value","title":"Pages printed","x":6,"y":2,"w":3,"h":2,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","variableName":"pagesPrinted","valueField":"value","decimals":0},{"id":"list-jobs","type":"report","title":"Print jobs","x":0,"y":4,"w":12,"h":4,"reportPath":"root.platform.reports.mes-print-jobs"},{"id":"begin-print","type":"function","title":"Begin print","x":0,"y":8,"w":6,"h":2,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","functionName":"mes_print_do","buttonLabel":"Begin PRINT-2026-001","inputJson":"{\"jobNo\":\"PRINT-2026-001\"}"},{"id":"complete-print","type":"function","title":"Complete print","x":6,"y":8,"w":6,"h":2,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.printer-01","functionName":"mes_print_complete","buttonLabel":"Complete PRINT-2026-001","inputJson":"{\"jobNo\":\"PRINT-2026-001\"}"}]}
